title: rhodiola tuberosa
intro: Rhodiola tuberosa, also known as Arctic rhodiola or rose root, is a perennial plant native to the high-altitude mountain ranges of the Himalayas and the Tibetan Plateau. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and adaptogenic effects. The health benefits of Rhodiola tuberosa include reducing stress and anxiety, improving mental performance and mood, and boosting the immune system. Rhodiola tuberosa is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as capsules, teas, and tinctures, which are often used to support mental and emotional well-being.
